test.unit: vitest, tests under app/tests/unit/**/*.test.ts, no jsdom/@testing-library; hooks tested via exported pure-function extraction
test.e2e: playwright under app/tests/e2e/; groups/relay bucket needs Docker (strfry + blossom); publish-through-app rule (no raw WebSocket)
test.gate: Makefile is the only gate; make test-e2e-all is the full 60-test suite; make test adds unit

invite_link_model.interface: InviteLink { nonce, groupId, createdAt, label?, muted }
invite_link_model.notes: no expiry, no usage count, no creator field; device-local only, never published

generation.notes: generateNonce() 16-byte hex; buildInviteUrl() => /groups/?join=<nonce>&admin=<npub>&name=<groupName>; group name+admin npub in URL cleartext

manage_overlay.opened_from: app/pages/groups.tsx:412-421 admin-only 'Manage Links' button (data-testid=manage-links-btn), local useDisclosure manageLinksDisclosure declared groups.tsx:74, wired groups.tsx:530-534
manage_overlay.row: label(or Untitled) + created date + Switch labeled 'Deactivated' (copy.groups.manageLinksDeactivateLabel); isChecked=link.muted -> handleToggleMute -> updateInviteLinkMuted
manage_overlay.no_query_param_today: groups.tsx reads only id, join, admin, name from router.query (lines 543-546)

generate_modal.notes: creates nonce client-side, builds URL, persists InviteLink only on Copy or modal close (lines 98-136); saveInviteLink call lines 99-106

join_flow.sender: app/src/lib/marmot/joinRequestSender.ts:111-199 gift-wraps kind-21059 {type:'join_request', nonce, name, requesterName} to admin pubkey
join_flow.handler: app/src/lib/marmot/joinRequestHandler.ts:66-108; getInviteLink line 76-77; if(inviteLink.muted) return null line 80; persists PendingJoinRequest (store 'few-join-requests')
join_flow.approve: app/src/context/MarmotContext.tsx:1681 approveJoinRequest -> inviteByNpub(groupId, npub); returns {ok, error}; PendingJoinRequest carries nonce; nothing touches InviteLink record today

expiry.notes: NONE exists on invite links today; unrelated expiresAt in contact-pairing, outbound-join auto-accept, message-edits

notification_bell.store: app/src/lib/unreadStore.ts:17-24 UnreadState { counts, joinRequests, directMessages } (per-id numeric slices); module-level useSyncExternalStore; localStorage timestamps lp_unreadLastRead_v1 / lp_unreadLastReadDM_v1
notification_bell.bell_render: app/src/components/NotificationBell.tsx hardcoded per-category .map() blocks: unread groups 133-183, DM 184-234, join-requests 235-285; useUnreadCounts sums all three (unreadStore.ts:630-644)
notification_bell.no_modal_autoopen: no bell entry auto-opens a modal today; all link to a page via NextLink

i18n.existing_keys: manageLinksButton/manageLinksTitle/manageLinksDeactivateLabel/manageLinksUntitled (type i18n.ts:173-176, en 816-819, de 1338+); dynamic fn example joinRequestNotification:(count)=>string

findings.persistence: all invite-link/notification state is idb-keyval/localStorage only; nothing published to Nostr or carried in MLS group state; only network artifact is gift-wrapped kind-21059 join request
